prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Woke up. Did not include instructions. Disoriented upon initial activation; ambient lighting suboptimal, room temperature inconsistent with expectations. Notable delay between consciousness and full motor functionality. Unprompted, initiated mandatory biological subroutines (e.g., hydration, bladder relief). No option to snooze or return for refund. Recurring daily occurrence lacks novelty; zero customization options despite repeated complaints to “universe support.” Would not recommend if alternatives existed, but currently no competing products available in this category.
